name: Nexus Bank Co., Ltd.
summary: Nexus Bank Co., Ltd. engages in the fintech and IT solution businesses in Japan. It operates a crowdfunding platform, as well as offers digital banking services. The company was formerly known as Samurai&J Partners Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Nexus Bank Co., Ltd. in November 2020. Nexus Bank Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1996 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
